reviews.comment:
Pésima la atención se toman todo el tiempo del mudo más de 40 minutos esperando con tres autos. Hay que rezarle para que te carguen si andas apurado ni pases

(Translated by Google)
The service is terrible; they take forever. I waited over 40 minutes with three cars. You practically have to pray they'll load you; if you're in a hurry, don't even bother.

Buena atención!

(Translated by Google)
Great service!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/656140726491061597/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25GbVptYzVNbGxtU25OS1ZtZDBNMEkzYWt0QmMxRRAB

reviews.comment:
La verdad, que fuimos en busca de comer algo calentito...valla que comimos muy rico..fresco y por sobre todo la amabilidad de las Chicas que atienden..da gusto ser atendido así...nos sentimos muy a gusto..lindo lugar limpio y buena honda...nos quedamos un buen ratito...y así emprendimos nuestro regreso...fue bueno que la otra estación solo te ofrecían sándwich de heladera ( que esa no era nuestra idea) pues la cocina estaba cerrada..Así que pensamos probemos en el ACA??? ....y valla que nos sorprendimos..ya el olorsito de hamburguesas no atrapó...ni decir lo ricas que estaban..
Y como vuelvo a reiterar..LA ATENCIÓN GENIAL...da gusto volver ..sigan así..y no duden en hacer una paradita...(turistas o no)...un lindo lugar...para parar y cargarse de buena Honda....

(Translated by Google)
Honestly, we went looking for something warm to eat...and boy, did we eat something delicious! It was fresh, and above all, the girls who served us were so friendly. It's a pleasure to be treated like that. We felt very comfortable. It's a nice, clean place with a great atmosphere. We stayed for quite a while before heading back. It was good that the other station only offered sandwiches from the fridge (which wasn't what we were looking for) because the kitchen was closed. So we thought, "Why not try ACA?" And boy, were we surprised! The smell of the hamburgers was enough to entice us...not to mention how delicious they were! And as I'll say again, the service was fantastic. It's a pleasure to return. Keep it up, and don't hesitate to stop by (tourists or not). It's a great place to stop and recharge your batteries.

reviewReply.comment: Muy amable su comentario, la esperamos nuevamente. Gracias.

(Translated by Google)
